ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the political figure who tweeted */,
  "ideology" REAL /* Ideology score of the tweet author */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the tweet author */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Original text of the tweet */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment classification of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Vote indication related to the tweet (e.g., 'Aye', 'No') */,
  "ideology_cluster" TEXT /* Cluster classification of ideology (e.g., Left, Centrist, Right) */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Cleaned text of the tweet for analysis purposes */,
  "vader_score" REAL /* VADER sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "bert_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment classification based on BERT analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the tweet author */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions in the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "party_ideology" REAL /* Ideology score of the political party (e.g., left, centrist, right) */,
  "party_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the political party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet being analyzed */,
  "vader_sentiment" REAL /* VADER sentiment score for the tweet */,
  "bert_sentiment" TEXT /* BERT sentiment classification for the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ideology_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ideology cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the ideology cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the ideology cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_analysis_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis history entry */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet being analyzed */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment analysis entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_analysis_history_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES sentiment_analysis ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_analysis_history_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, view_tweet) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
